attributes.description: Every LNK file embeds a 'Distributed Link Tracker' GUID + MAC address from the machine where the LNK was originally created. When file.tracker.machine_id differs from the current host's machine_id (or the MAC vendor / creation time looks foreign), the LNK was made on a different machine and copied here — strong indicator of data movement, joint workstation use, or LNKs imported via removable media. Compare machine_id values across rows: if they group cleanly into 2+ distinct IDs, this host has been receiving LNKs from elsewhere.
attributes.title: LNK Files: Distributed Tracker GUID (cross-machine evidence)
